scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test:build: node -e "try { require('fs').rmSync('.next', {recursive: true, force: true}) } catch(e) {}" && npm run build
scripts.test:production: npm run test:build && npm run start
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['.next', 'node_modules', 'package-lock.json'].forEach(p => { try { fs.rmSync(p, {recursive: true, force: true}) } catch(e) {} })"
scripts.fresh: npm run clean && npm install && npm run build
